reasons: Tigreal can group and stun enemies, giving Gord a clean area-damage window.
Gord's damage becomes more reliable when enemies are unable to leave his skill zones or ultimate path.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the grouped crowd-control setup, while Gord follows with area damage and beam pressure.
worksBestWhen: Gord is already in range before Tigreal commits.
Gord saves his main damage for the confirmed control window.
failureCases: Tigreal engages outside Gord's follow-up range.

reasons: Atlas can drag multiple enemies into one location, making Gord's area skills easier to land.
Gord can punish the grouped targets from safer distance.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies with Fatal Links, and Gord follows with repeated area magic damage.
worksBestWhen: Gord saves his main damage for the grouped target area.
Atlas drags enemies into Gord's cast range.
failureCases: Enemies spread before Gord follows up.

reasons: Minotaur gives Gord a frontline and crowd-control layer.
Gord benefits from Minotaur forcing enemies to stay in predictable teamfight zones.

proof.summary: Minotaur creates space and control, giving Gord safer time to cast from behind the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur stays between Gord and enemy divers.
Gord positions behind the frontline before committing his ultimate.
failureCases: Minotaur's control is unavailable when enemies dive.

reasons: Franco can hook or suppress one target, giving Gord an easy line for stun and damage follow-up.
The pair can convert a single catch into a pick before a full teamfight begins.

proof.summary: Franco catches the target, then Gord layers stun and magic damage onto the immobilized enemy.
worksBestWhen: Franco pulls the target into Gord's skill range.
Gord has a clear cast angle after the pull.
failureCases: Franco pulls the target away from Gord's casting angle.

reasons: Lolita can protect Gord from ranged projectile pressure while Gord casts.
Her stun setup can create a short window for Gord's follow-up damage.

proof.summary: Lolita helps protect Gord's position and can set up enemies for Gord's area damage.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stands between Gord and ranged threats during siege or defense.
Gord casts after Lolita creates a safe line.
failureCases: Enemies dive from angles that bypass Lolita's shield direction.
Gord casts too far forward without peel.
